title: linum angustifolium var. agreste
intro: Linum angustifolium var. agreste is a variety of flax, a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Linum angustifolium var. agreste, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be used to support overall health and well-being.
